response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with a strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and demonstrates deep expertise in backend development, system architecture, and performance optimization. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling is directly relevant to modern full-stack roles, and his long tenure in senior roles (e.g., re:cinq, Optilyz) shows sustained impact. The only minor gap is limited Kotlin/Java exposure in his recent roles, though his historical experience covers these languages.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Strong background in system architecture, scalability, and performance optimization
Proven track record of delivering high-impact solutions in enterprise environments (e.g., Optilyz, Dunnhumby)
concerns: Limited recent exposure to Kotlin/Java for backend services
Some roles focus on niche languages (e.g., Dlang) that may not align with current stack priorities
No explicit mention of Vitest, though Jest is implied in his testing experience

key_factors.factor: Relevant full-stack experience with required stack
Niche language focus (Dlang) vs. required Kotlin/Java
